data.title: Hello, Cincinnati: CAVA’s Expansion Into the Midwest Continues
data.description: CAVA, a Mediterranean fast-casual restaurant brand listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol CAVA, has recently inaugurated a new outlet in Cincinnati, Ohio. The new branch, CAVA Oakley Station, spans across 3,200 square feet and offers a vibrant dining area. It provides digital order pick-up and delivery services to cater to customers' needs, ensuring convenience based on their preferences. By serving bold and irresistible Mediterranean dishes, the restaurant aims to provide a satisfying and nourishing experience to visitors in Cincinnati.

data.title: Unixell Biotech receives IND clearance by FDA for its Allogeneic iPSC-Derived cell therapy, UX-GIP001, for focal Epilepsy
data.description: In Shanghai on March 13, 2026, Unixell Biotech marked a major achievement when UX-GIP001, its iPSC-derived allogeneic cell therapy for focal epilepsy, received clearance for Investigational New Drug (IND) from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) on March 12.

data.title: Standard Nuclear Appoints Kevin Harrill as Chief Financial Officer
data.description: Standard Nuclear, a leading TRISO nuclear fuel producer, has appointed Kevin Harrill, CPA, as its new Chief Financial Officer, effective March 9, 2026. Harrill, previously CFO of Centrus Energy Corp., is set to drive financial strategies as Standard Nuclear expands production to cater to rising demand for advanced nuclear fuel. The company is experiencing growth in demand from both commercial and government clients, prompting the need to bolster its production capacity. Harrill's experience positions him well to navigate the financial landscape as Standard Nuclear navigates this period of expansion.

data.title: Form Health Joins the Lilly Employer Connect Platform
data.description: Form Health, a top provider of science-based obesity and cardiometabolic care, has partnered with Eli Lilly and Company on their Lilly Employer Connect platform. This collaboration aims to enhance access to obesity management medications for employers through customizable benefit options and consistent pricing. By joining Lilly Employer Connect, organizations have the opportunity to collaborate with independent program administrators like Form to create initiatives that improve access to obesity treatment.
